prompt_queue.prompt: Space: blog. Generate one distinct, buildable website concept for an independent blog or small publisher with a defined point of view. Examples of valid sub-spaces: a single-author essay site about a niche topic (urbanism, classical music, regional cuisine, climbing), a small group blog covering a sub-culture or scene, a long-running personal journal or photoblog, a research-style blog dissecting a specific industry, a serialized fiction or poetry site. Stay inside content publishing; do not propose news outlets large enough to imply a newsroom, do not propose pure newsletter platforms with no public web home.
